speaker: alex
message: Hey! Welcome to the backend team. I see you've set up the Express app — nice clean structure. I'd suggest we start by adding input validation to the users endpoint. I've filed a bead for it.

speaker: user
message: Thanks Alex! I'll take a look at that. Should I use zod or express-validator for the validation?

speaker: alex
message: Great question. I'd recommend zod — it gives you TypeScript types for free and the error messages are pretty good out of the box. Here's the general pattern: define your schema, then parse the request body in the route handler.
